description: Design System compartido de MD Consultoría TI para CuentosIA, Palabras Vivas, dashboards y landing pages

stack.components: shadcn/ui (20) + custom (17) + layout (2) + dashboard (8) + landing (5) + responsive (5) + video (6) + template-iphone (12) + template-zentry (10)
stack.video: Remotion v4.0.438 (6 compositions: BrandReveal, DeviceMockup, TextHook, FeatureShowcase, CTAEnd, ProductDemo)

knownIssues.description: Node 25 causa SyntaxError en Next.js 15 builds. Usar Node 22 LTS.
Tailwind v4 @theme inline no funciona en CSS importado por layouts. @layer utilities pierde especificidad vs globals.css.
knownIssues.workaround: Usar clases CSS explícitas fuera de @layer, scoped bajo .template-name.

knownIssues.description: Safari bloquea .play() indirecto. loadedData.length checks fallan.
globals.css h1-h6 font-size vars override Tailwind utilities.
knownIssues.workaround: Usar p tags o CSS layers para headings que necesiten Tailwind sizing.

auditorCiudadano.changes: Full Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui migration, 8 extracted components, responsive sidebar, Framer Motion transitions, Whisper transcribe route, Neon DB seeded

nextSteps: Motor IVA segunda pasada: HoloCard tilt, GlassmorphismCard, CountUp, stagger
Migrar CFDI-Motor a DS (DEUDA-TECNICA.md: P0 tokens, P1 KpiCard, P4 badges)
